description_long: This is a classical-style marble sculpture of a robed human figure standing atop a multi-tiered square pedestal. The figure appears to be draped in flowing garments, with one arm bent and the other resting at its side, evoking a sense of calm and dignity. The pedestal is composed of three progressively smaller square platforms, each with visible weathering and discoloration, suggesting outdoor exposure. The sculpture and base are predominantly white with some grayish and greenish stains, likely from age and environmental factors. The overall form is solid and monumental, with no visible moving parts or openings. The setting and design indicate it is intended as a public monument or decorative feature in an urban or park environment.
description: A white marble sculpture of a robed human figure stands on a weathered, multi-tiered square pedestal. The statue exudes classical elegance and is designed for outdoor display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal detail of the robed figure and the face of the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the drapery of the robe and the side profile of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the pedestal, with less detail on the figure's features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile of the figure and pedestal, with visible weathering on the base.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is situated on a stone platform, likely outdoors in a public urban or park setting.
